Value: 208","CreationDate":"2025-12-05","SUBJECT":"LANDFILL TAX, WALES","CATEGORY":"LANDFILL TAX, WALES","SUMMARY":"These Regulations prescribe the standard rate, lower rate and unauthorised disposals rate for landfill disposals tax chargeable on taxable disposals (within the meaning of Part 2 of the Landfill Disposals Tax (Wales) Act 2017) made on or after 1 April 2026.","":""}
